Subscribe Insights Spaces Products Awards submissions Awards Magazine Books Events Login Subscribe Search About FRAME Awards Launched in 2018, FRAME Awards gives designers global visibility and pushes the boundaries of design. Now in its 9th edition, it attracts over 1,000 submissions yearly globally. Submit to our 2026 programme and let the world discover your work. WHY SUBMIT TO FRAME AWARDS? • Global visibility for every submission  • Fair judging and genuine chances to win • Feedback from industry leaders • Easy submission process • Feature opportunities on FRAME’s publications Global visibility for every submission  All projects submitted to the FRAME Awards are published on  frameweb.com . With over 50K monthly visitors, the platform offers meaningful visibility among a global audience of commissioners, designers, peers and brands. Want your studio to be seen by the international design community?  Submit your work  to FRAME Awards. Fair judging and genuine chances to win  All submissions are reviewed by our jury, with their assessments transparently shared in an online dashboard, ensuring everyone a fair and equal chance to win. Each submission is automatically considered for both  Winner of the Month  and  Winner of the Year. Feedback from industry leaders A deep-dyed jury-assessment: each month, an expert panel of architects, designers, and industry leaders reviews submissions and selects the top-scoring projects and products.  Easy submission process With our user-friendly online tool, start your submission any time, save progress, and complete it later – all at your convenience. Need help? Consult our guidelines or contact us:  awards@frameweb.com Feature opportunities on FRAME’s publications Our editorial team closely follows the FRAME Awards, seeking new talent and projects to feature across our publications.  Winners  receive a certificate, trophy, and complimentary membership – and gain visibility through FRAME’s print and digital platforms. A FRAME Award signals design excellence recognized worldwide, as past winners attested: “The recognition led to international client inquiries, speaking invitations, and a milestone debut at Milan Design Week.” And: “It strengthened the trust and confidence clients place in us.” Submit here. Subscribe to our newsletter for updates. Email awards@frameweb.com for questions. Download the submission guide for more information. INFO Frame Publishers B.V. raw_content.about: Frameweb | Interior design and architecture magazine exploring what’s next in spatial design. Enjoy 2 free articles a month. For unlimited access, get a membership now. Subscribe Insights Spaces Products Awards submissions Awards Magazine Books Events Login Subscribe Search About FRAME: THE ESSENTIAL SOURCE FOR INTERIOR DESIGN PROFESSIONALS FRAME is the first and leading global publisher dedicated to interior design. Through our flagship magazine, books, awards programme, and digital content, we empower designers and industry professionals with forward-looking inspiration and insights that transform spaces and improve lives around the world. Join FRAME if you’re a designer, design professional, or design-oriented brand. Discover who we are and what we offer on this page. WHAT WE OFFER FRAME helps you cut through the noise – with content and opportunities that elevate your creative impact in the design world. Here’s our offer: FRAME Magazine – Print Membership Our flagship print magazine, 5 issues per year, delivered to your doorstep. Each issue covers a pressing theme shaping the future of design. Take time for significant reading. [ Subscribe to print ]. FRAMEWEB – Digital Membership Gain full access to frameweb.com, our library of online inspiration and insight – updated daily since 2015. Ideal for staying strategically aware, creative direction and project development. [ Unlimited digital access here ]. FRAME Awards A spotlight on spatial and product design excellence. Submit your work, get published and win! 31 categories, over 1000 submissions. [ Submit your project ]. FRAME Books & Events Premium books that explore sector-defining topics and groundbreaking studios. Events that bring the design community together. Build your design library [ Explore books ]; expand your network [ Explore events ]. Advertising & Media Partnerships Connect with our global community of >1M design professionals via curated print, digital and event formats. Explore media- and advertising collaborations or request our mediakit → [ Get in touch ]. Follow us on social media ( Instagram ,  LinkedIn ,  Pinterest ,  Facebook ,  X ,  Youtube ,  Weibo ,  WeChat ) and  sign up  to our newsletter. WHO WE ARE A global publication for interior design – since 1997 FRAME was founded in Amsterdam in 1997. At the time, the creators worked at a local interior design magazine and felt it was time for a new approach: a creative, bold voice with a global perspective. A magazine that would bring curated inspiration from Japanese designers to the Netherlands – and back again. When these ideas didn’t resonate with their employer, they decided to venture out on their own. FRAME Magazine was born, giving interior designers around the world a space of their own. The great indoors FRAME focused on interior design, recognizing it as a significant professional discipline. As humanity spends most of its life indoors, and spaces profoundly shape how we live, work and connect, interior design has the power to transform lives. Through focussed coverage and global publication, FRAME set out to reveal that transformative value and initiate a cycle of recognition and progress across the industry. This foundation laid 28 years ago – to elevate the interior design profession through focussed coverage and global publication – still guides what we do today. Design intelligence With our team of trend researchers and journalists, we explore the full spectrum of interior design – or spatial design , as we call it today. With a forward-looking agenda, we sift through the landscape to select what’s relevant for today’s design professional. We showcase the most innovative spaces, products, and the creatives behind them. And now more than ever, we provide essential industry insights, helping our readers navigate an increasingly complex and demanding field. The next space FRAME inspires and informs, challenges and recognizes, with an unchanged aspiration: to advance the world of spatial design. By providing leading content, we empower our 1+ million readers and followers to create spaces that transform lives. We gave the global interior design community a space of its own 28 years ago; join us as we continue to shape the future of design. EDITORIAL STATEMENT Independent. Membership-based. Quality-first. Finally, we’d like to emphasise that FRAME remains an independent publisher, in a media-landscape dominated by larger conglomerates and commercial titles. This independence enables a journalistic approach, with an editorial team that operates autonomously and puts readers first. Thanks to our members, we stay focused on what matters most: creating content that delivers leading inspiration and insight. We’re also supported by media partners – design-driven brands that value our curated content across channels and aim to connect with and contribute to the global design community. For transparency, partner content is clearly labelled. We thank our members and media partners – their continued support sustains FRAME and the independent design journalism we stand for. For contact details and ways to get in touch, visit frameweb.com/contact . INFO Frame Publishers B.V.
